channel.title: WorldBuilder
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates

item.title: WorldBuilder 0.1.0+232
item.description:
## What's Changed * Better blitting from renderer to avalonia by @trevis in https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/pull/2 * Feat/rendering multi viewport camera sync enhanced docking by @Vermino in https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/pull/10 * Feature/keyboard mapping dialog by @Vermino in https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/pull/5 * Clone/Stamp Tool Implementation by @Vermino in https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/pull/9
## New Contributors * @trevis made their first contribution in https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/pull/2 * @Vermino made their first contribution in https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/pull/10
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commits/latest
